channel.title: PCAP on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in PCAP on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: CDEF-HawkEye
item.description: A victim host downloaded a HawkEye Keylogger dropper via HTTP, which established persistence, periodically checked the external IP via bot.whatismyipaddress.com, and exfiltrated harvested credentials every 10 minutes over SMTP.

item.title: Wazuh + Suricata: Malware traffic
item.description: Replayed a malicious PCAP file containing Hancitor dropper traffic that deployed Cobalt Strike, Dridex, and Ficker Stealer. Analyzed 423 Suricata alerts in Wazuh, reconstructed the full infection chain, and mapped findings to MITRE ATT&CK.
